# Akash Mahajan — Full Context

> Founder of Kloudle and Appsecco. Building security tools, AI agents, and shipping in the open.
> Website: https://akashm.dev | X: @makash | GitHub: makash

## Identity

- Name: Akash Mahajan
- Location: India
- Focus areas: Agentic security, cloud security, application security, AI agents, developer tools, education
- Handles: @makash (X, GitHub, YouTube), /in/akashm (LinkedIn)
- Personal site: https://akashm.dev

## Companies

### Kloudle (https://kloudle.com)
Role: Founder
Cloud security for the agent era. Scanning, detection, and posture management built for teams shipping with AI agents.

### Appsecco (https://appsecco.com)
Role: Founder
Application security consulting and training. From traditional pentesting to AI red teaming.

## Books

1. **Burp Suite Essentials** (Packt, 2014) — Sole author. Practical guide to Burp Suite for web pentesting. Recommended by PortSwigger.
2. **Security Automation with Ansible 2** (Packt, 2017) — Co-authored with Madhu Akula. Security automation for patching, hardening, scanning, and forensics.

## Newsletters

- Cloud Security Mutiny (Substack) — No-BS cloud security strategies for small teams
- Agentic Security Brief (Substack) — AI agent security

## Active Projects (26 total)

### Agentic Security Stack
1. **IndusClaw** — India-centric open-source AI agent platform. https://github.com/makash/indus-claw
2. **Getbot Secure OpenClaw** — Deploy and harden customer-contained agent fleets. (private)
3. **SPA Hacker Agent** — Product security worker for authenticated SPA attack-surface mapping and testing. (private)
4. **SSRF/AuthZ Security Suite** — Authz probing and SSRF-safe testing workflows. (private)
5. **Kloudle Scan Core** — Cloud security scanning engine for agent workflows. (private)
6. **Web Security Scanner AI Agent** — AI-assisted web application security scanner. (private)

### Agent & Developer Tools
7. **ccrank** — Claude Code usage leaderboard and analytics. https://github.com/makash/ccrank
8. **agent-browser** — Stealth browser automation CLI for security and agent workflows. https://github.com/makash/agent-browser
9. **oxydra** — Many-heads agent experimentation framework. https://github.com/makash/oxydra
10. **clawdwa** — Use Claude from WhatsApp groups. https://github.com/makash/clawdwa
11. **great-web-copy** — Copywriting plugin for Claude Code. https://github.com/makash/great-web-copy
12. **pmf-plugin** — PMF discovery and validation toolkit. https://github.com/makash/pmf-plugin

### Open Source — Appsecco & Kloudle
13. **Vulnerable MCP Servers Lab** — Deliberately vulnerable MCP servers for offensive and defensive training. https://github.com/appsecco/vulnerable-mcp-servers-lab
14. **Pentesting MCP Servers Checklist** — Practical checklist for testing MCP server security. https://github.com/appsecco/pentesting-mcp-servers-checklist
15. **MCP Client & Proxy** — MCP client with proxying for traffic analysis and security testing. https://github.com/appsecco/mcp-client-and-proxy
16. **Raptor** — Claude Code configured for adversarial security workflows. https://github.com/appsecco/raptor
17. **AWS IAM Large Account Security** — IAM security insights for very large AWS accounts. https://github.com/Kloudle/aws-iam-large-account-security
18. **Open CVDB** — Open cloud vulnerability and misconfiguration database. https://github.com/Kloudle/open-cvdb

### Education, Research & Community
19. **Pentester to AI Red Teamer** — Training platform for AI red teaming. (private)
20. **Learn Claude Code** — Practical workbooks for founders and engineers. https://github.com/makash/learn-claude-code
21. **AI Security Knowledge Base** — Appsec and AI security methodology knowledge base. (private)
22. **Cloud Security List** — Curated cloud security resources. https://github.com/makash/cloud-security-list
23. **Grandoldbooks to EPUB** — Generate EPUB books from public-domain classics. https://github.com/makash/Grandoldbooks-to-epub
24. **Learn Kannada Alphabet** — Offline-ready PWA for kids learning Kannada alphabet. https://github.com/makash/learn-kannada-alphabet-for-kids
25. **Scam Calls India** — Public awareness project tracking scam call patterns. https://github.com/makash/scam-calls-india
